TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Alapanay == O sapiharatengan to sakaira to cecay a kalas ko Alapanay a niyaro, roma haca o Ku-cay-ne-po (sowal no Holam). O kasiikedan no niyaro' O tadakalimelaan ko panay to 'amis, mipanganngan to panay to fafahiyan, Nanay makadofah ko nilowadan sanay. O nikalopisak no Alapanay Itiniay i maci no Taitung ko Alapanay a niyaro', 923 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,795 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 24% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 670 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 76% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2,125 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 19%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, romasato 3%. O finacadan no Yincomi itiniay i Taitong-si(台東市 sowal no holam ) no Taitong-siyen(台東縣sowal no holam) ko Alapanay a niyaro', O pitooran no finawlan Itiya ho, ano ira ko mapatayay, "madepoc to" sa anca "malato' to" sa ko sowal no 'Amis, awaay ko somowalay to "mapatay to" sanay. anini sato o roma to ko pitooran, mamadepoc to ko tamdaw awaay to ko mi'ang'angay no kasafinacadan no 'Amis.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u aɾapanaj == o~u sapiħaratəŋan to~u sakaira to~u ʦəʦaj a kaɾas ko~u aɾapanaj a nijaro~u, ro~uma ħaʦa o~u ko~u~u-ʦaj-nə-po~u (so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam). o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u taɬ~ɮakaɾiməɾaan ko~u panaj to~u ʡamis, mipaŋanŋan to~u panaj to~u fafaħijan, nanaj makaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u niɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan sanaj. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u aɾapanaj itiniaj i maʦi no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u aɾapanaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~umasato~u *%. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi itiniaj i taito~uŋ-si(*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u taito~uŋ-sijən(***so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam) ko~u aɾapanaj a nijaro~uʡ, o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan itija ħo~u, ano~u ira ko~u mapatajaj, "maɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ to~u" sa anʦa "maɾato~uʡ to~u" sa ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, awaaj ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u "mapataj to~u" sanaj. anini sato~u o~u ro~uma to~u ko~u pito~uo~uran, mamaɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw awaaj to~u ko~u miʡaŋʡaŋaj no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis.
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Alapanay == O sapiharatengan to sakaira to cecay a kalas ko Alapanay a niyaro, roma haca o Ku-cay-ne-po (sowal no Holam). O kasiikedan no niyaro' O tadakalimelaan ko panay to 'amis, mipanganngan to panay to fafahiyan, Nanay makadofah ko nilowadan sanay. O nikalopisak no Alapanay Itiniay i maci no Taitung ko Alapanay a niyaro', 923 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,795 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 24% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 670 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 76% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2,125 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 19%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, romasato 3%. O finacadan no Yincomi itiniay i Taitong-si(台東市 sowal no holam ) no Taitong-siyen(台東縣sowal no holam) ko Alapanay a niyaro', O pitooran no finawlan Itiya ho, ano ira ko mapatayay, "madepoc to" sa anca "malato' to" sa ko sowal no 'Amis, awaay ko somowalay to "mapatay to" sanay. anini sato o roma to ko pitooran, mamadepoc to ko tamdaw awaay to ko mi'ang'angay no kasafinacadan no 'Amis.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u aɾapanaj == o~u sapiħaratəŋan to~u sakaira to~u ʦəʦaj a kaɾas ko~u aɾapanaj a nijaro~u, ro~uma ħaʦa o~u ko~u~u-ʦaj-nə-po~u (so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam). o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u taɬ~ɮakaɾiməɾaan ko~u panaj to~u ʡamis, mipaŋanŋan to~u panaj to~u fafaħijan, nanaj makaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u niɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan sanaj. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u aɾapanaj itiniaj i maʦi no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u aɾapanaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~umasato~u *%. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi itiniaj i taito~uŋ-si(*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u taito~uŋ-sijən(***so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam) ko~u aɾapanaj a nijaro~uʡ, o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan itija ħo~u, ano~u ira ko~u mapatajaj, "maɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ to~u" sa anʦa "maɾato~uʡ to~u" sa ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, awaaj ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u "mapataj to~u" sanaj. anini sato~u o~u ro~uma to~u ko~u pito~uo~uran, mamaɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw awaaj to~u ko~u miʡaŋʡaŋaj no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis.
